original_thesis: The 'get better through struggle' stack. Growth mindset reframes failure as learning; deliberate practice structures the improvement; desirable difficulties ensure the practice is hard enough to produce adaptation; persistence keeps going through plateaus; resilience recovers from setbacks. This stack turns effort into skill instead of just into exhaustion.
what_this_stack_defeats: Talent-only thinking, easy practice that doesn't improve, giving up at plateaus
notes: Thesis mentions desirable-difficulties and resilience which aren't members, but the core claim holds: growth-mindset provides belief, deliberate-practice provides method, persistence provides duration, self-determination provides intrinsic motivation.
